result:
**Proposed goal:** Add a save/load system so users can export their cell editor creations to files (and load them back), enabling a personal library of patterns.

This is the natural next step — the editor mode lets you draw custom patterns, but they vanish when you quit. Adding `s` to save the current grid to a `.cells` file and `l` to load one back turns the editor from a toy into a tool. It would also support loading standard plaintext `.cells` format files from the broader Game of Life community.
